settings.title: Warranty Information
settings.subtitle: Complete Protection for Your Purchases
settings.description: Every product purchase at QuickBee includes comprehensive warranty coverage. Learn about manufacturer warranty, extended warranty options, and how to file a warranty claim.

settings.title: Types of Warranties
settings.content:
Manufacturer Warranty

  • Coverage: Manufacturing defects, material and workmanship issues
  • Duration: Typically 1-3 years depending on product category
  • Includes: Free repair or replacement during warranty period
  • Exclusions: Damage from misuse, accidents, unauthorized repairs

QuickBee Extended Warranty

  • Coverage: Extends manufacturer warranty by 1-3 additional years
  • What's Covered: Manufacturing defects, component failures, accidental damage (optional)
  • Benefits: Free repair/replacement, no deductible, priority service
  • Cost: 10-20% of product price (varies by category)

Accidental Damage Protection

  • Coverage: Accidental drops, spills, electrical surges
  • Who Needs It: Smartphones, laptops, and portable electronics
  • Benefits: Covers accidental damage not covered by manufacturer
  • Cost: Additional 5-10% of product price

settings.liquid:

settings.title: How to File a Warranty Claim
settings.content:
Step-by-Step Process

  1. Contact Us: Call our warranty team or submit a claim form online
  2. Verify Coverage: We check if your product is under warranty
  3. Arrange Pickup: We pick up the faulty product (free pickup in Kathmandu)
  4. Repair/Replace: Item is repaired or replaced at our service center
  5. Delivery: Fixed product delivered back to you (usually within 5-10 days)

Required Documentation

  • Original proof of purchase (receipt or invoice)
  • Warranty card (if applicable)
  • Product in original condition (no visible damage)
  • Detailed description of the issue

What's NOT Covered

  • Physical damage from drops, accidents, or misuse
  • Damage from water or liquid exposure (unless covered in policy)
  • Unauthorized repairs or modifications
  • Normal wear and tear
  • Software issues (unless caused by manufacturing defect)

settings.description: Common questions about warranty coverage and claims
